placements.current_visible_title: Red Oak Floor Refinish Rancho Santa Fe | Dustless Belt Sanding
placements.current_description:
Description:
Fast answers: 858-699-0072 • sandiegohardwoods@gmail.com
 • www.sdhardwoods.com

See finished results and hundreds of before/after galleries: www.sdhardwoods.com

Licensed Flooring Contractor • Bona Certified Craftsman: https://www.bona.com/en-us/homeowner/find-a-contractor/contractor-details/?storeid=83667

Solid red oak in Rancho Santa Fe Farms (east of Carmel Valley, San Diego) with very yellow/orange oil-based polyurethane sanded away to clean, flat wood. Precision belt sanding with a Lägler SUPERHUMMEL is connected to a Bona portable dust-containment unit visible in the video, capturing polyurethane and wood dust at the source so it doesn’t go airborne in the home. Later in the process (not shown), our Bona Power Drive 4-head planetary system and rotary finishing minimize wood removal and deliver the flattest surface. This project received a modern whitewash Scandinavian look. We offer commercial-grade water-based systems including Traffic HD in five sheen levels.

What’s covered:
• HEPA dust containment with Bona DCS for cleaner indoor air
• Belt sanding on solid red oak with the Lägler SUPERHUMMEL
• Flattening waves from a previous improper sanding
• Power Drive planetary flattening and rotary finishing (later step, not shown)
• Whitewash color options and durable water-based topcoats

Areas served: Rancho Santa Fe, Carmel Valley, La Jolla, Del Mar, Solana Beach, Encinitas, Carlsbad, Oceanside, Point Loma, Mission Hills, Kensington, San Clemente, Dana Point, Laguna Beach, Newport Beach, Newport Coast, and more..

#HardwoodFloorRefinishing #RanchoSantaFe #SanDiego #DustlessSanding #RedOak
